prompt: The clipped region still shows drawing outside the clip. What is the bug?
choices: setClip(null) removes the clip region entirely, so the subsequent blue fillRect covers the entire image including the area that was supposed to be clipped to red only
setClip must use a Shape parameter, not a rectangle
fillRect ignores the clip when Color.BLUE is set
explanation: setClip(null) clears the clipping region so all subsequent drawing covers the full image surface. The final blue fillRect overwrites everything. Fix: do not clear the clip until all clipped drawing is finished, or save/restore the Graphics state with g2.getClip()/setClip() to restore it only when needed.
